commands.name: start
commands.description: Initializes your profile, gives a starter enemy, and sets up your collection

commands.name: profile
commands.description: Shows your Discord profile stats including enemies collected, wins/losses, and currency

commands.name: enemy collection
commands.description: View all collected enemies with filters by area, rarity, and type

commands.name: enemy info
commands.description: Displays an enemy card with image, ability, stats, and lore

commands.name: trade
commands.description: Engages a trade with another user to exchange enemies

commands.name: fight
commands.description: Starts a fight against another user

commands.name: sell
commands.description: Sells an enemy from your collection for in-game currency

commands.name: help
commands.description: Shows a list of all available commands and how to use them

commands.name: stats
commands.description: View global bot statistics and leaderboards

commands.name: config server
commands.description: Opens the server settings panel for the bot

commands.name: config player
commands.description: Opens the player settings panel for personal preferences
